name: Marinated Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless beef sirloin steak - cut into 1-inch cubes
1 Green bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
1 Red bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
1 Yellow bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef cubes with salt and pepper to taste.
2. In a bowl, combine lemon juice, grated onion, red wine vinegar, vegetable oil, ground cumin, garlic powder, and crushed red pepper.
3. Add the beef cubes to the marinade and stir until well coated.
4. Thread the marinated beef cubes and bell pepper pieces onto 4 skewers, adding one parboiled onion to each.
5. Place the kabobs on a rack in the broiler, positioning them so the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil for 12 to 15 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef reaches the desired doneness.
7. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed. Makes 4 servings.
